name: zpwr-modal-editor
description: Shared modal-editing (Vim / Emacs) editor for the MenkeTechnologies GUI apps. Vim/Emacs engines vendored from monaco-vim / monaco-emacs and adapted behind a surface adapter so the editor can drop into any app (word/ppt/etc.). esbuild-bundled to a vendored IIFE (window.ZModal).
author: MenkeTechnologies <linux.dev25@gmail.com>
